raw.title: Yet another apocalyptic prediction…
raw.excerpt: From rising GDP losses to ecosystem collapse, climate reports are stacking up fast. The problem is we have no language for the difference between a bad situation and a civilisational threshold.

llm_processed.summary: The article analyzes apocalyptic predictions about ecological collapse, linking biodiversity loss to potential economic and geopolitical crises.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: Connects to resilience strategies in post-growth frameworks
